title: 3D Mace for ATM10
description: 3D mace variants for ATM10 based on Stridey of VanillaTweaks 's Original (uploaded with permission)
body:
**This Project Adds 3D item and held models for the Allthemodium Mace variants featured the ATM10 modpack.**

![Spining mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/327d251c271531b4fc6cdd74ff6f9280285aec2b.gif)

**This replaces the large slab like textures with a nice 3D model that doesnt take up the entire screen.**


**This Pack was uploaded with the explicit premission from the original author of the VanillaTweaks 3D mace, Stridey.**
